title: Product Design Lead
_verificationNote: Verified live via browse.py (YC job page rendered, full job description confirmed). No posted date visible; using today's date. VetRec (YC S23) — enterprise-grade AI veterinary assistant for medical note generation, dental charts, discharge instructions, and patient record summaries. 25-person team, founded 2023. First in-house product designer hire. Owns end-to-end UX across Webapp, iOS, Android, and Chrome extension for veterinarians, vet techs, medical directors, and practice managers. AI tool fluency required (Claude, Cursor, Figma Make). 5+ years B2B or clinical software required. $100K-$130K + equity.
